creator: freebsd@omarpolo.com
text:
Created attachment 251387
gmid-2.0.5.diff

The 2.0.5 update fixes a logic error that could cause a DoS.  It is a recommended update for all users of the 2.0.x series since no breaking changes were done since gmid 2.0.

If possible, I'd like if this could be also backported to supported FreeBSD versions that have gmid 2.0.


Thanks,

Omar Polo
